steps.title: Use the zero product property
steps.content:
Because the product equals $0$, at least one factor must equal $0$:
$$
5x+4=0\quad\text{or}\quad 2x-5=0
$$

steps.title: Solve both factors
steps.content:
Solving each equation gives
$$
5x+4=0
$$
$$
x=-\frac{4}{5}
$$
and
$$
2x-5=0
$$
$$
x=\frac{5}{2}
$$

steps.title: Choose the listed solution
steps.content: Only one of these solutions appears among the choices. The answer is C.
